About Me

Who I Am

My name is Aliya Pratiwi, and I am an enthusiastic IT learner with a strong interest in technology and problem solving. I enjoy exploring how systems work and finding efficient solutions to technical issues.

I have a solid understanding of fundamental IT concepts, including system operations, basic programming logic, and IT support practices. I continuously improve my technical knowledge to stay updated with current technology trends.

I am committed to continuous learning and eager to grow in the IT field. My goal is to build a professional career where I can contribute my skills and provide reliable technical support to individuals and organizations.

Areas of Expertise

01
⚙️
Technical Skills
Solid understanding of fundamental IT concepts including system operations, basic programming logic, and IT support practices. Skilled in identifying and resolving common hardware and software problems with logical thinking and attention to detail.
IT Support Troubleshooting System Ops

Networking Skills
Familiar with networking fundamentals including TCP/IP, DNS, IP addressing, and basic router configuration. Understands how devices communicate within a network and how to identify common connectivity issues.
TCP/IP DNS IP Addressing Routing

Comfortable working with industry-standard tools and platforms for productivity and development. Continuously expanding knowledge of current software and technology ecosystems.
MS Office Windows OS HTML CSS JavaScript

Able to handle hardware installation, component checking, and basic maintenance. Understands computer parts such as motherboard, RAM, storage devices, and peripherals for effective diagnosis and maintenance.
